title: CLI: clap v4 derive, subcommand routing, global options
description:
Set up the full CLI structure with clap v4 derive API. Top-level subcommands: init, serve, admin (sub-sub: set-password, enable-totp), persona (sub-sub: create, list, update, delete, rotate-key), token (sub-sub: mint, list, revoke), follow, unfollow, domain-block, domain-unblock, domain-block-list, queue (sub-sub: inspect, retry-dead), compat-test. Global options: --config path.

Agent workflow: Spawn a subagent to enumerate all CLI commands from the spec and verify none are missing.

Test discipline:
- Test --help output for each subcommand (snapshot test)
- Test that required args (--display-name for persona create) produce clear errors when missing
- Test that --config with a non-existent file produces a clear error before attempting any DB operation

Defensive programming:
- All CLI args that take file paths: validate existence/permissions before proceeding
- All CLI args that take usernames: validate against [a-z0-9_-]+ regex before DB query (prevent SQL injection even with parameterized queries as defense-in-depth)
acceptance_criteria: smallhold --help lists all subcommands; each subcommand --help shows its args; missing required arg produces actionable error message; --config with bad path fails before opening DB
